name: Mahir Patel
text:
**Errors found (3) — Pretty confident:**

Error 1: Park & Yamamoto (2022) and the “Consistency-Aware Reasoning” framework appear hallucinated or misattributed. Self-consistency was introduced by Wang et al. (2022), and improvements varied across benchmarks rather than being a universal 18%.
Error 2: “BLEU-Bench” by Martinez et al. (2021) cannot be verified and appears to be a fabricated benchmark and citation.
Error 3: Chen et al. (2023) did not introduce GraphRAG for multi-hop scientific question answering. The commonly cited GraphRAG work is Edge et al. (2024), focused on query-focused summarization over large document collections.

Park & Yamamoto (2022): High risk
Liu et al. (2023): Medium risk — too vague to verify without a title
Wang et al. (2023): Medium risk — too vague to verify without a title
Martinez et al. (2021): High risk
Chen et al. (2023): High risk
Vaswani et al. (2017): Safe — correctly refers to the Transformer paper.
